case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. IAN CARRIER ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRIER, IAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 220 GOLDEN GATE AVENUE, #213, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARRIER, IAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARRIER, IAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED AUG-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARRIER, IAN
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
